---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---

---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---


```{r}
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
```

```{r}
paper_meta <- read_xlsx("/Users/rmhadgm/OneDrive - University College London/Ghorashian_group/CARPALL_scRNAseq/metadata_from_paper.xlsx", skip = 2)
paper_meta <- paper_meta[1:73, 1:7]
paper_meta <- as.data.frame(paper_meta)
paper_meta <- filter(paper_meta, !Sort %in% "NA")
names(paper_meta)[6] <- "GEX_id"
names(paper_meta)[7] <- "TCR_id"
names(paper_meta)[3] <- "Timepoint_bin"
```

```{r}
paper_meta  <- paper_meta %>%
  separate_longer_delim(
    c(Sort, GEX_id, TCR_id),
    delim = ","
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      c(Sort, GEX_id, TCR_id),
      trimws
    )
  )
```

```{r}
write.csv(paper_meta, file = "carpall_metadata_organised.csv")
```
